data.title: Valentine's Day deal from Nework: USD50 off MoveMate portable TVs for meaningful shared moments. Shop now.
data.description: In Pomona, California, on February 14, 2026, Nework, an emerging company specializing in audiovisual and collaborative technology, is marking Valentine's Day by providing a special promotion: customers can enjoy a $50 instant discount on MoveMate portable TVs. To take advantage of this offer, visit Nework's official website where you can explore and purchase the ideal...

data.title: Luki Lab introduces six new toy brands, including Spherehedz, Gem Pets, and Melon Mayhem, focusing on original IP. #ToyBrands #Creativity
data.description: A diverse range of products including action figures, collectibles, and games is being introduced to the market, with prominent releases such as Spherehedz, Gem Pets, and Melon Mayhem leading the way. This move highlights the company's dedication to developing original concepts and engaging gameplay. The announcement was made in Irvine, California on February 14, 2026, demonstrating the company's commitment to catering to the demand for innovative toys that encourage creativity among families.

data.title: Hunter Nation launches campaign to repeal Prop 4 in Utah, mobilizing sportsmen and gun owners through digital outreach and petition drive. Featuring support from Donald J. Trump Jr. and Ted Nugent.
data.description: In Salt Lake City on February 14, 2026, Hunter Nation, a prominent hunting advocacy group, initiated a targeted digital outreach, petition initiative, and video promotion featuring Donald J. Trump Jr. and Ted Nugent. This effort was aimed at galvanizing Utah sportsmen and gun owners.

data.title: Investors who suffered losses in Picard Medical, Inc. should contact Wolf Haldenstein, class action lawsuit filed. Deadline April 3, 2026.
data.description: The deadline for the lead plaintiff in the class action lawsuit against Picard Medical, Inc. (NYSE: PMI) is April 3, 2026. New York, Feb. 14, 2026 - Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP has reported the filing of this lawsuit on behalf of individuals affected by the company.

data.title: Investors who lost money in Mereo BioPharma ($MREO) urged to contact Wolf Haldenstein due to the class action lawsuit. Deadline on April 6, 2026.
data.description: The deadline for the lead plaintiff in the class action lawsuit against Mereo BioPharma Group PLC (NASDAQ: MREO) is set for April 6, 2026. This announcement was made by Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP on February 14, 2026, in New York. The lawsuit includes all persons who are part of the class action against Mereo.

data.title: TEWAMOTO debuts HydraX electric watercraft concept at Miami Boat Show, aiming for high-performance electric mobility.
data.description: On February 14, 2026, in Miami, the U.S.-based mobility brand TEWAMOTO introduced the HydraX electric personal watercraft design concept at the Miami International Boat Show. This design concept highlights their latest vision for high-performance electric mobility on water. TEWAMOTO is known for its global focus and is registered in the United States. The unveiling took place at the Miami International Boat Show, emphasizing innovation and advancements in electric watercraft technology.

data.title: Linglong Sport Master summer tire gets recommendable rating by ACE Auto Club Europe after testing ten 225/40 R18 XL tires.
data.description: In Hanover, Germany on February 14, 2026, the ACE Auto Club Europe conducted thorough and unbiased testing on ten summer tires sized 225/40 R18 XL designed for the compact class. The testing aimed to ensure the tires' dependability in various conditions like heat, heavy rain, and abrupt risky situations. The results are crucial for drivers needing performance and safety from their tires.

data.title: Bitcoin has dropped 45% from its peak but hasn't hit the ultimate bear market bottom yet, per analysts.
data.description: A recent report from CryptoQuant suggests that despite experiencing a significant 45% decline from its October peak, Bitcoin has not reached its bear market bottom yet.

data.title: 28th Shanghai Int'l Film Festival will run June 12-21 with first overseas event held in Berlin on Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: In Berlin on February 13, 2026, the Shanghai International Film Festival (SIFF) held its inaugural "China Film Night" as part of its first overseas promotional event of the year. The event aimed to advance its mission of fostering an open, inclusive, and collaborative atmosphere.

data.title: KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME celebrates Half Anniversary with ★5 [Scorching Variant] transformation. Update brings new features and Gacha Tickets.
data.description: Today, in Los Angeles on February 14, 2026, KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME, a collaboration between Akatsuki Games, TOHO, and Production I.G, is excited to launch the second phase of its Half Anniversary celebration. This update introduces the formidable new ★5 [Scorching Variant] transformation, adding enhanced features to the game.

data.title: Basic Fun! announces Fall 2026 Home Arcade Collection featuring PAC-MAN and SONIC THE HEDGEHOG. Acquisition of Arcade1Up assets in 2025.
data.description: Basic Fun! has announced that the Fall 2026 Line will feature significant additions, including the renowned #1 Arcade Franchise PAC-MAN and the launch of the First-Ever SONIC THE HEDGEHOG Home Arcade Cabinet. This announcement comes after Basic Fun!’s acquisition of select assets of the Arcade1Up brand in 2025. The company, based in Boca Raton, Florida, is a leading global designer and marketer. The new lineup for Fall 2026 showcases the integration of these iconic arcade games, bringing excitement to gaming enthusiasts.

data.title: BougeRV introduces new metal water heater with 3-second flash heating, ±1°F temp control, and advanced safety features.
data.description: Revolutionary outdoor water heating option unveiled with 3-second flash heating, accurate ±1°F temperature regulation, compatibility with multiple power sources, and top-notch safety features. The announcement was made by BougeRV, a renowned provider of portable outdoor equipment and sustainable energy solutions. This advanced system is set to redefine the standard with its cutting-edge features, aiming to enhance outdoor water heating experiences.

data.title: LEGO debuts latest innovations at Toy Fair 2026, including LEGO SMART Play™, unveils new sets across fan-favorite themes.
data.description: In New York on February 14, 2026, the LEGO Group launched their latest 2026 portfolio at Toy Fair's Booth #1335. The new sets and building experiences cater to all fans and showcase the innovative LEGO® SMART Play™ concept. This interactive brick-based platform aims to redefine the future of play.

data.title: Licensed candies inspired by Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 released globally by Amos Sweets. MILAN, Feb. 14, 2026.
data.description: Amos Sweets has introduced a new candy collection inspired by the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026, featuring fun designs, unique textures, and interactive experiences. The collection, released in Milan on February 14, 2026, showcases the essence of the upcoming games through a variety of sweet treats.

data.title: Smith Brands launches talkBAK®, a voice recorder toy allowing 60-sec recording, instant playback, and pitch adjustment at Toy Fair.
data.description: Today in New York City, Smith Brands introduced talkBAK®, an innovative handheld voice recorder toy that allows kids to record up to 60 seconds of audio which can be played back instantly. Users also have the option to adjust the pitch higher or lower. Available in four distinct color variations, this new toy is a screen-free entertainment option.

data.title: DeWolfe Living spotlight Boston real estate & lifestyle on REAL Shows Network. Hosted by Tammy DeWolfe. Boston defines.
data.description: A new series hosted by Tammy DeWolfe is shining a spotlight on the individuals, communities, and enterprises that shape the essence of Boston. The initiative, based in Boston, is part of the REAL Shows Network (RSN), a TV network focused on showcasing real estate and lifestyle narratives. Launched on February 14, 2026, the series aims to celebrate the local charm and character of Boston, reaching a wide audience through RSN's national platform. Tammy DeWolfe's leadership in this endeavor promises to offer viewers an insightful glimpse into the diverse tapestry of Boston, with a focus on the stories of its residents, neighborhoods, and businesses.

data.title: Boeing in buy zone, leads 5 stocks to watch during short trading week with strong technical action.
data.description: A recently published report highlights the performance of five stocks from different sectors, showcasing strong technical indicators. Among the mentioned stocks are Boeing, Viking Holdings, and TJX, as well as an artificial intelligence-driven company in the construction sector. Boeing is noted to be leading the pack, holding steady in the buy zone. The article specifically mentions these stocks as ones to keep an eye on for investors, especially given the shortened trading week.

data.title: Shareholders in China Liberal Education Holdings Ltd. (OTCMKTS: CLEUF) who suffered losses urged to contact Wolf Haldenstein by March 31, 2026.
data.description: The lead plaintiff deadline for the class action lawsuit against China Liberal Education Holdings Ltd. (OTCMKTS: CLEUF) is on March 31, 2026. A law firm, Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, has disclosed this information in New York on February 14, 2026. The lawsuit pertains to certain matters concerning the Company.

data.title: New "Kaiju Power Rangers" action figure line debuts at Toy Fair, arriving at Target next month; merges Mighty Morphin Power Rangers and Godzilla franchises.
data.description: Unveiling at Toy Fair this weekend, the initial rollout will hit Target stores starting from next month in 2026. Playmates Toys is set to bring beloved characters to life for both children and collectors throughout the year. This latest partnership combines two iconic franchises, captivating fans of all ages.

data.title: Tamagotchi celebrates 30 years with new products, partnerships, and national events at New York Toy Fair.
data.description: At the New York Toy Fair, a significant year is marked with the introduction of novel products, retail engagements, and interactive fan events. Tamagotchi, the renowned digital pet, commemorates its 30th anniversary, symbolizing thirty years of cultural impact.
